query:
-- Update role column to support new system roles (use varchar to avoid enum migration issues)
ALTER TABLE users MODIFY COLUMN role VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';

-- Create module_permissions table: maps each module to allowed job roles
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS module_permissions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  moduleKey VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  moduleName VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  allowedJobRoles JSON NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Seed all DOS Hub modules with default permissions (Owner always has access)
INSERT INTO module_permissions (moduleKey, moduleName, allowedJobRoles) VALUES
  ('receipt-capture', 'Receipt Capture', '["Owner"]'),
  ('zoning-lookup', 'Zoning Lookup', '["Owner"]'),
  ('screen-ordering', 'Screen Ordering', '["Owner"]'),
  ('job-intelligence', 'Job Intelligence', '["Owner"]'),
  ('hubspot-crm', 'HubSpot CRM', '["Owner"]'),
  ('training', 'Training', '["Owner"]'),
  ('client-meeting-report', 'Client Meeting Report', '["Owner"]'),
  ('sales-pipeline', 'Sales Pipeline', '["Owner"]'),
  ('dashboard', 'Dashboard', '["Owner"]'),
  ('admin-users', 'User Management', '["Owner"]'),
  ('module-permissions', 'Module Permissions', '["Owner"]')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE moduleName = VALUES(moduleName);

-- Create module_permissions table: maps each module to allowed job roles

  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL

-- Seed all DOS Hub modules with default permissions (Owner always has access)

  ('receipt-capture', 'Receipt Capture', '["Owner"]'),
